ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data pertains to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to demographic details */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "daily_growth_rate" REAL /* Percentage of daily growth in confirmed cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "fatal_cases" INTEGER /* Number of fatal cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate as a percentage */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate as a percentage */,
  "affected_population_rate" REAL /* Affected population rate as a percentage */,
  "one_confirmed_per" INTEGER /* Number of people for every confirmed case */,
  "one_died_per" INTEGER /* Number of people for every fatal case */,
  "confirmed_per_1000" REAL /* Number of confirmed cases per 1000 people */,
  "died_per_1000" REAL /* Number of fatal cases per 1000 people */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of confirmed cases that require hospitalization */,
  "icu_rate" REAL /* Percentage of confirmed cases that require ICU care */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests out of total tests conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., health department, hospital, research institution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assurance check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "qa_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assurance check was performed */,
  "qa_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality assurance check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qa_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the quality assurance check */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the QA */,
  "qa_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality assurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)
